---
title: "📊 土壤数据分析"
---

# 土壤数据可视化示例

## R语言分析

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: "不同土壤深度有机质含量"
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# 创建土壤数据
set.seed(123)
soil_data <- data.frame(
  depth = rep(c("0-10cm", "10-20cm", "20-30cm", "30-50cm"), each=15),
  organic_matter = c(
    rnorm(15, 3.5, 0.5),
    rnorm(15, 2.7, 0.4),
    rnorm(15, 1.9, 0.3),
    rnorm(15, 1.1, 0.2)
  ),
  ph = c(
    rnorm(15, 6.5, 0.3),
    rnorm(15, 6.2, 0.3),
    rnorm(15, 5.8, 0.4),
    rnorm(15, 5.4, 0.4)
  )
)

# 土壤颜色主题
soil_colors <- c("#8B5A2B", "#B87333", "#D2B48C", "#5C3A1B")

# 绘制箱线图
ggplot(soil_data, aes(x=depth, y=organic_matter, fill=depth)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha=0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=soil_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title="不同土层有机质含量分布",
       x="土层深度",
       y="有机质 (%)") +
  theme(legend.position="none",
        plot.title = element_text(color="#5C3A1B", size=16, face="bold"))
```

## 统计摘要

```{r}
summary(soil_data)
```

## 相关性分析

```{r}
#| fig-cap: "土壤属性相关性热图"

library(corrplot)

soil_cor <- cor(soil_data[, c("organic_matter", "ph")])
corrplot(soil_cor, method="color", type="upper", 
         col=colorRampPalette(c("#5C3A1B", "white", "#8B5A2B"))(200),
         title="土壤属性相关性",
         mar=c(0,0,2,0))
```
